subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast clung to the Most Firm Handle! O beloved and affectionate friend! Upon thee be steadfastness in the Cause of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من تشبث بالعروه الوثقی ایها الحبیب الودود علیک بالثبوت علی امر الله و
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
